commit.subject: ATM-697 - Test Ubuntu through AT
commit.message:
ATM-697 - Test Ubuntu through AT

Patch to test Ubuntu support in AT

Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientdistro=el7 clientcount=2 testgroup=review-ldiskfs mdscount=1 osscount=1 serverdistro=el7
Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientdistro=ubuntu1604 clientcount=2 testgroup=review-ldiskfs mdscount=1 osscount=1 serverdistro=el7
